base.description: Brand base for purple (#2e1a47, the brand primary purple). The canonical purple colour at 0% tint, 0% shade. Aliased by tint.0 and shade.0.
Brand base for pink (#f7ced7, soft pink). The canonical pink colour at 0% tint, 0% shade. Aliased by tint.0 and shade.0.
Brand base for red (#e40046, the brand primary red). The canonical red colour at 0% tint, 0% shade. Aliased by tint.0 and shade.0.
Brand base for pale-blue (#ccedf3, palest blue). The canonical pale-blue colour at 0% tint, 0% shade. Aliased by tint.0 and shade.0.
Brand base for blue (#9adbe8, soft blue). The canonical blue colour at 0% tint, 0% shade. Aliased by tint.0 and shade.0.
Brand base for coral (#ff808b, warm coral). The canonical coral colour at 0% tint, 0% shade. Aliased by tint.0 and shade.0.

off-white.description: Brand off-white. Used as a near-white fill where pure white would feel too clinical.

80.description: Brand neutral — stone. Mid-light grey for surfaces and dividers.

97-5.description: Off-white with a faint purple cast. Used for canvas backgrounds.

base.description: Brand neutral — midnight. Deep blue-black for inverse surfaces and brand contrast.

15.description: Dark grey — secondary text, supporting copy.

25.description: Dark grey — secondary text, supporting copy.

65.description: Mid-grey — tertiary text, disabled labels, placeholder text.

95.description: Hairline grey for dividers, separators, subtle borders.

base.description: Near-black — primary text, the strongest neutral in the brand palette.
Success green — default. Status indicator and finish-action base.

20.description: Success green — light variant for hover states.
Success green — dark variant for pressed states.

base.description: Warning red — default. Used for error/danger messaging.
Focus yellow — default. Keyboard focus indicator colour.

90.description: Link blue — pale tint for hover backgrounds.

body-primitive.description: Default body and UI typeface (primitive). Aliased by semantic.font.family.body.

brand-primitive.description: Branded display typeface (primitive). Use exclusively for brand expression.

regular.description: Regular weight for body copy and standard UI text.

semibold.description: Semibold weight. Reserved for future emphasis tokens.

bold.description: Bold weight used by all heading and display compositions.

body.description: Body and UI typeface. Default for all text.

brand.description: Branded display typeface. Use exclusively for brand expression.

fallback.description: System fallback. Used automatically when body fails to load.

micro.description: Smallest size — legal text, footnotes, disclosures.

caption.description: Caption — image captions, helper text, table metadata.

body-sm.description: Small body — dense UI text, compact lists.

body.description: Default body — paragraph copy, form fields, standard UI text.

heading-small.description: Lead paragraph — introductory paragraph beneath a heading.

heading-medium.description: Smallest heading — section subheadings and card titles.

heading-large.description: Mid heading — section headings within a page.

display.description: Hero / display — landing-page hero text and brand-led moments.

xs.description: Extra-small density. Icon ↔ label gap, tight inline groups.

sm.description: Small density. Default button gap, tight rows.

md.description: Medium density. Default padding/gap for most components.

lg.description: Large density. Card padding, comfortable padding.

xl.description: Extra-large density. Generous padding for hero blocks.

xs.description: Tight vertical rhythm — closely related items, list rows.

sm.description: Default vertical rhythm — gap between paragraphs.

canvas.description: Default page background. Off-white with a faint purple cast.

raised.description: Surfaces above canvas — cards, modals, sheets, dropdowns.

subtle.description: Subtle purple-tinted surface for grouped content sections.

muted.description: Muted neutral surface — disabled-row backgrounds, code blocks.

inverse.description: Inverse surface — dark backgrounds for footers, callouts. Pair with text.on-inverse.

danger-subtle.description: Pale red surface for inline error rows and danger callouts.

info-subtle.description: Pale blue surface for informational message backgrounds.

accent-blue.description: Pale blue accent surface for decorative blocks.

accent-pale-blue.description: Pale-blue accent surface — softest blue option.

rest.description: Primary action — rest. Highest-emphasis button. Pair with text.on-primary.
Secondary action — rest. Mid-emphasis. Pair with text.on-secondary and border.action-secondary.
Tertiary action — rest. Low-emphasis dark button. Pair with text.on-tertiary.

hover.description: Tertiary action — hover (purple at 10% white, slightly lighter).

pressed.description: Tertiary action — pressed (purple at 20% black, slightly darker).

rest.description: Finish action — rest. Domain-specific button for completing a journey.
Destructive action — rest. Use for irreversible actions (delete, remove). Pair with text.on-danger.

hover.description: Destructive action — hover. Manually defined darker step.

pressed.description: Destructive action — pressed. Manually defined darker step.

disabled.description: Disabled background applied to any action regardless of intent.

primary.description: Default text — body, headings, UI labels. Strongest hierarchy step.

tertiary.description: Lowest-emphasis text — placeholder, very subtle metadata. Canonical owner; text.disabled aliases here.

brand.description: Branded text accent — themed callouts, signatures. Use sparingly.

primary.description: Default icon colour — strongest hierarchy step.

secondary.description: De-emphasised icon — paired with secondary text.

tertiary.description: Lowest-emphasis icon — paired with tertiary text and placeholders.

brand.description: Branded icon — themed graphics, brand moments.

default.description: Default link text — unvisited links. Distinct role from feedback.info despite shared hex.

pressed.description: Link text when pressed. Pair with link.bg.active-pressed or link.bg.visited-pressed.

focus.description: Link text when keyboard-focused. Pair with link.bg.focus, border.focus, focus.ring.

disabled.description: Disabled link text. Aliased to text.tertiary.

active-hover.description: Subtle blue tint behind unvisited link on hover.

active-pressed.description: Solid blue fill behind unvisited link when pressed.

visited-hover.description: Subtle purple tint behind visited link on hover.

visited-pressed.description: Solid purple fill behind visited link when pressed.

focus.description: Yellow focus fill behind keyboard-focused link.

offset.description: Distance between text baseline and underline. CSS: text-underline-offset.

default.description: Underline colour for unvisited links at rest.

visited.description: Underline colour for visited links at rest.

default.description: Success state — confirmation, validation passes. Status indicator only.
Error / danger state. Status indicator only — for destructive button intents use action.danger.

subtle.description: Pale red background for inline error rows.

default.description: Warning state. Shares hex with focus.indicator — distinct role.

subtle.description: Pale blue background for informational message backgrounds.

rest.description: Compact raised surface at rest — cards, dropdowns, popovers.
Broad raised surface at rest — modals, sheets.

indicator.description: Focus colour (yellow). Used for background fills and outer focus ring.

contrast.description: Colour rendered on top of focus.indicator.
